meaning: n.(烤肉用的)串肉扦,扦,棒vt.上叉
examples: The authors skewer a few pieces of lazily received wisdom.
Instead, I could skewer it through, say, the horizontal axis.
You can also barbecue them, with or without a skewer in the middle.
The cheese is drizzled with olive oil, flavoured with oregano, grilled and manageably served on a wooden skewer.
The wafflier the piffle, the more sharply Mr Nicholson wields his skewer.
